evidence_rows.reading: The draft exposes multiple candidate substates rather than collapsing everything into one bucket.
At least one candidate is sparse and should remain provisional, which is useful for review but not for formalization.

interpretation: V1.12H is a review-only candidate substate drafting phase.
Its job is to present a bounded structure draft for owner review, not to freeze labels.
The lawful next posture is review, not automatic label split.
